page_metadata.biotools__summary: CLIP web server detects selection in immunoglobulin sequences. Web server features include V(D)J germline segment identification with IMGT-alignment, batch submission of sequences and integration of test statistics.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CLIP web server detects selection in immunoglobulin sequences. Web server features include V(D)J germline segment identification with IMGT-alignment, batch submission of sequences and integration of test statistics.
